General.Name: Hang Yick Holdings Company Limited
General.Description: Hang Yick Holdings Company Limited, a steel and metal engineering company, designs, manufactures, supplies, and installs steel and metal products for construction projects in Hong Kong and the People's Republic of China. It offers steel and metal products, including metal gates, collapsible gates, fire-insulated shutters, rolling shutters, metal doors, and other steel and metal products, as well as installation works and after-sale services. The company also provides steel and metal engineering solutions on various contract forms, such as balustrades, rolling shutters, mailbox, handrails, cat ladders, and other products; and metal gates engineering services to public and private sectors. Its portfolio of public and private sector building projects includes community and residential developments. In addition, the company the design, manufacture, supply, and installation for passive fire products, such as insulation and non-insulation fire rolling shutters and gates. Further, it offers structural design solutions. It serves construction and engineering companies. Hang Yick Holdings Company Limited was founded in 1993 and is headquartered in Yau Tong, Hong Kong
General.Address: Sunray Industrial Centre, Yau Tong, Hong Kong
